name: comfyui-codex
description: Codex guidance for ComfyUI APIs, workflows, troubleshooting, and beginner onboarding.

interface.shortDescription: Build, run, and debug ComfyUI workflows.
interface.longDescription: ComfyUI Codex gives Codex a focused operating guide for local ComfyUI Server API work, Comfy Cloud API context, workflow JSON authoring, custom node and model troubleshooting, and concise onboarding for new users.
defaultPrompt: Use $comfyui to debug my ComfyUI workflow.
Use $comfyui to build an API-format workflow.
Use $comfyui to explain ComfyUI to a beginner.
